milestones: Output contains an [Iteration Summary] section that describes at least one exchange between buyer and seller regarding the Stoggles safety glasses negotiation

Output contains an [Agent Actions and Tools Used] section listing actions for both a buyer agent and a seller agent with each entry including Action Taken, Tool Parameters (as JSON), and Result fields
At least two distinct negotiation tools are used across all agent actions (e.g., offer price, reject and counter, provide information, or end negotiation)
Tool Parameters JSON includes a price or counter_price value anchored around the $33 USD reference price of the product
Output contains a [Key Strategies and Observations] section that references the buyer's focus on warranty/after-sales support and the seller's focus on maintaining profit margins
The negotiation involves multiple turns with at least one offer and at least one counter-offer or rejection demonstrating a back-and-forth bargaining process
